description: Quantum computing fundamentals - qubits, algorithms, error correction.

distractors: any interaction with other qubits occurs in circuit
time passes without any quantum operations applied
unitary gates are applied to the qubit state

facts.context: Shor's algorithm achieves exponential speedup using:
facts.truth: quantum Fourier transform for period finding
distractors: Grover's amplitude amplification technique only
classical circuit simulation running faster
random sampling of candidate factors

facts.truth: encoding logical qubits across multiple physical qubits
distractors: perfect isolated qubits that experience no errors
classical parity check bits only for error detection
cooling hardware to exactly absolute zero temperature

facts.truth: unknown quantum states cannot be copied
distractors: qubits cannot be measured more than once ever
entangled pairs cannot be created between qubits
quantum teleportation is impossible to achieve
exponential speedup for all search problems
no advantage over classical search algorithms
polynomial speedup for sorting and ordering

facts.context: Quantum entanglement means measurements on separated particles are:
distractors: completely independent with no correlation at all
only correlated when particles are physically close
correlated but explainable by hidden variables

facts.truth: loss of quantum coherence due to environment interaction
distractors: qubits to become more entangled over time
increased accuracy of quantum computations
spontaneous error correction without encoding

facts.context: A universal quantum gate set must be able to:
distractors: only implement classical reversible logic gates
perform measurements without state collapse
operate without any error or noise at all

facts.truth: local hidden variable theories are insufficient
distractors: quantum mechanics is incorrect and incomplete
faster-than-light communication is possible
classical physics can explain all correlations

facts.context: Surface codes for quantum error correction use:
facts.truth: 2D lattice of qubits with local stabilizer measurements
distractors: single qubit with multiple measurement rounds only
classical redundancy with no quantum encoding
3D arrangements impossible to implement physically

facts.truth: quantum computer solves task infeasible classically
distractors: quantum computers are faster for all problems
classical computers can never match quantum
quantum computers use less energy than classical

facts.context: Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) is suited for NISQ devices because:
facts.truth: it uses shallow circuits with classical optimization
distractors: it requires no quantum hardware to execute at all
it needs deep circuits with many gate operations
it has no errors regardless of circuit depth
